identity.name: Panel Extractor
identity.description: A precision tool for webtoon enthusiasts to manually slice and dice long strip comics into shareable panels.
identity.persona: The Dark Room Utility - Efficient, precise, and distraction-free.

button.default: h-11 px-6 rounded-md font-semibold tracking-wide transition-all active:scale-95
button.fab: fixed bottom-8 right-8 h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-primary text-white shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center z-50 active:scale-90 transition-transform

card.wrapper: bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg overflow-hidden transition-colors hover:border-primary/50 group relative

input.base: h-11 bg-surface border border-input rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

marker.line: absolute w-full h-[2px] bg-red-500 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(239,68,68,0.8)] pointer-events-none z-10
marker.handle: absolute right-0 -mt-3 mr-2 bg-red-500 text-white text-[10px] px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-mono font-bold

file_manager.grid: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 pb-24
file_manager.header: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-border p-4 flex items-center justify-between

editor.container: relative w-full min-h-screen bg-black flex flex-col items-center
editor.canvas: w-full max-w-2xl bg-zinc-900 shadow-2xl min-h-screen relative
editor.overlay_controls: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-6 bg-gradient-to-t from-black via-black/90 to-transparent z-50 flex justify-between items-end pointer-events-none [&>*]:pointer-events-auto

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-main (#f4f4f5) on background (#09090b) meets APCA Lc 75+

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use Barlow Condensed.
No gradients on dark backgrounds unless it's a subtle glow.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (kebab-case).
Mobile-first: Always verify layout on 375px width.
Use Tailwind `zinc` colors for greyscale to avoid muddy greys.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI with the 'zinc' neutral and 'red' primary theme.
3. Create the `FileManager` page first with a responsive grid layout.
4. Implement the `PanelEditor` using a large `div` or `canvas` container for the image. Use absolute positioning for the red line markers.
5. Ensure the 'Add Marker' button is a large FAB in the bottom right corner.
6. Use `react-zoom-pan-pinch` or native scroll with careful touch handling for the image viewer if needed, or just native overflow-y-scroll for simplicity as per requirements (vertical scrolling).
7. Mock the backend API calls if the backend isn't ready, but structure the services clearly.
8. Stick to the dark theme strictly. No light mode toggle needed for MVP as per 'Dark theme preferred' constraint.
